name: Vented attic, R-30 loose-fill cellulose on ceiling deck
description: Vented attic, R-30 loose-fill cellulose on ceiling deck
note: Common WAP retrofit. Air seal ceiling plane first; baffles maintain 1" venting at eaves.

name: Vented attic, R-38 loose-fill cellulose
note: Meets IECC 2021 CZ5 ceiling minimum (R-49 with energy credit; R-38 allowed if 100% cavity coverage).

name: Vented attic, R-49 loose-fill cellulose
note: MA Stretch Code attic R-value for CZ5. Standard for new MA construction.

name: Vented attic, R-60 loose-fill cellulose
note: Recommended for high-performance / Passive House. Requires raised-heel truss for full depth at eaves.

name: Cathedral ceiling, 2x10 16 o.c., R-30 FG batt, asphalt shingle
description: Cathedral ceiling, 2x10 16 o.c., R-30 FG batt, asphalt shingle
note: 9.25" cavity barely fits R-30 batt; vent baffle reduces effective depth. Many older MA homes.

name: Cathedral ceiling, 2x12 16 o.c., R-38 FG batt, asphalt shingle
description: Cathedral ceiling, 2x12 16 o.c., R-38 FG batt, asphalt shingle
note: Vented cathedral path; 1" min air space above batt with vent baffle.

name: Unvented cathedral, 2x10 16 o.c., R-45 ccSPF flush-fill
description: Unvented cathedral, 2x10 16 o.c., R-45 ccSPF flush-fill
note: Unvented assembly per IRC R806.5; ccSPF on underside of roof deck must meet condensation-control R-value (CZ5: R-20 min ccSPF for condensation control).

name: Hybrid unvented cathedral: 2x10 + R-20 polyiso above deck
description: Hybrid unvented cathedral: 2x10 + R-20 polyiso above deck
note: Above-deck polyiso CI moves dewpoint outboard; permits FG batt below. Common for Passive House. Verify roof structural for added load.

name: Hybrid: R-30 ccSPF cavity + R-10 polyiso above deck
description: Hybrid: R-30 ccSPF cavity + R-10 polyiso above deck
note: Hybrid approach widely used in MA retrofits where above-deck CI alone is impractical.

name: Raised-heel truss with full R-49 loose-fill at eaves
description: Raised-heel truss with full R-49 loose-fill at eaves
note: 12" raised heel ensures full R-49 depth maintained over top plate. Recommended detail.

name: Flat roof, 2x10, R-30 ccSPF flush-fill, EPDM membrane
description: Flat roof, 2x10, R-30 ccSPF flush-fill, EPDM membrane
note: Common addition/dormer assembly. Below new MA code without supplemental rigid; include for retrofit baseline.

name: Flat roof, R-30 ccSPF + R-20 polyiso above deck, TPO membrane
description: Flat roof, R-30 ccSPF + R-20 polyiso above deck, TPO membrane
note: High-performance flat-roof assembly; total ~R-50; controls condensation per ratio rule.
